name: X-Golf Toledo
address: 7141 Spring Meadows W Dr, Holland, OH 43528
about: X-Golf Toledo is an indoor golf simulator facility that offers players the ability to play on famous golf courses from around the world. The venue utilizes state-of-the-art indoor golf simulators that combine camera systems, infrared lasers, impact sensors, and advanced gaming software to provide an accurate and realistic golf experience. With pricing per simulator, per hour, it accommodates up to six people per bay and features a full sports bar and lounge, making it suitable for both casual play and social events.
why_golfers_like_it: Up to 6 people per bay for group play
Full sports bar and lounge for socializing

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen serving tasty bites and appetizers
Great beer selection and top quality liquor available at the sports bar

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, club rentals are available. The simulator has its own tee built into the system that collects and tees the balls automatically.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed. X-Golf Toledo has a full kitchen and bar with a great beer selection and top-quality liquor.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each individual can finish 18 holes in about one hour, or two people can play 9 holes each in about one hour. For each additional person, it will take approximately one hour to play 18 holes.

faq.question: Is X-Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, X-Golf welcomes children of all ages and skill levels.
